name: Artificial Intelligence
description: The simulation of human intelligence processes by machines, especially computer systems.

name: Machine Learning
description: A field of study in artificial intelligence concerned with the development and study of statistical algorithms that can learn from data.

name: Cloud Computing
description: The on-demand availability of computer system resources, especially data storage and computing power, without direct active management by the user.

name: DevOps
description: A methodology in the software development and IT industry that integrates and automates the work of software development and IT operations.

name: Cybersecurity
description: The protection of computer systems and networks from information disclosure, theft of or damage to their hardware, software, or electronic data.

name: Web3
description: An idea for a new iteration of the World Wide Web which incorporates concepts such as decentralization, blockchain technologies, and token-based economics.

name: Open Source
description: Software for which the original source code is made freely available and may be redistributed and modified.

name: Vector Databases
description: A database system designed to store, manage, and search embedding vectors, crucial for AI and machine learning applications.

name: AI Agents
description: Autonomous or semi-autonomous AI systems that can perceive their environment, make decisions, and take actions to achieve specific goals.

name: Developer Tools
description: Software tools that software developers use to create, test, and debug other programs and applications.
